_meta.purpose: 効果タグが空だった変化技27件を、タグ概念を廃し『effectsだけ読めば技の説明にもプログラム解釈にもなる』完全構造へ書き換えたパイロット。JP説明→英訳(gloss)→構造化effects。notesは廃止し全内容を構造へ吸収。レビュー後 pokechan_data.js の battle_data へ適用予定。
principles: 略語を使わない。effects から英語/日本語の平文へ戻せるくらい平易に書く(例: '2 turns' であって '2T' ではない)。
target は full word: self / opponent / team(自分側の場・控え除く) / opponent_team / ally / all(場の全員) / field(場全体).
優先度(priority)はバトル開始時に最初に評価される独立要素なので effects に入れず move-level フィールドで持つ。

schema.priority: 数値(行動順)。0は省略。move-level(effectsには入れない)。
schema.flags: 音技などの技フラグ(sound等)。

effects[].kind: 効果の意味動詞。固有の技は固有kind(taunt/encore/destiny_bond...)。共通ファミリは汎用kind+param(status/stat/set_screen/set_ability/heal/swap_stats...)。
effects[].target: self / opponent / team / opponent_team / ally / all / field.
effects[].phase: on_use(使用時に即時) / lasting(状態を duration ターン継続) / delayed(後のターンに発動) / this_turn(そのターンのみ) / turn_end(ターン終了時).
effects[].duration: 継続ターン数(lasting時). 数値 or 'until_user_leaves' 等.
effects[].params: value(状態名/特性名/型/フィールド名) / fraction(割合) / stat+stages(能力ランク) / stats(入替対象) / multiplier 等 kind毎.
effects[].condition: その効果が適用される条件 {type,...}.

schema.immune: 対象が無効化するケース(move-level).

moves.name: リフレクター
moves.en: For 5 turns, halves physical damage taken by the user's team (2/3 instead of 1/2 in double battles). Not reduced against critical hits. Persists even after switching out.

moves.name: ねむる
moves.en: Fully restores the user's HP and cures all status, then puts the user to sleep for 2 turns (wakes on the 3rd turn).

moves.name: みちづれ
moves.en: User enters Destiny Bond: if the user faints from the target's attack before its next action, the target faints too.

effects.effect: if user faints from opponent's move before user's next action, that opponent also faints

fails_if.note: gen7+ で連続使用は必ず失敗

moves.name: ロックオン
moves.en: Next turn, the user's move is guaranteed to hit the locked-on target.

effects.effect: user's next move against this target cannot miss

moves.name: メロメロ
moves.en: If the target is the opposite gender, infatuates it: each turn the target has a 50% chance to be unable to act. Fails on same gender or genderless.

effects.effect: each turn 50% chance the target cannot act

moves.name: ねごと
moves.en: Usable only while asleep. Randomly uses one of the user's own moves; only Sleep Talk's PP is consumed.

moves.name: いたみわけ
moves.en: Sets both the user's and the target's HP to the average of their current HP.

effects.effect: set both HP to the average of their current HP
effects.dynamax_handling: compute average on base HP, then apply the delta to current Dynamax HP

moves.name: バトンタッチ
moves.en: Switches the user out and passes its stat changes and volatile effects to the incoming Pokemon.

moves.name: アンコール
moves.en: For 3 turns the target can only use its last-used move; ends early if that move's PP reaches 0.

effects.effect: target may only use its last-used move

moves.name: あまいかおり
moves.en: Lowers the target's evasion by 2 stages.

moves.name: ちょうはつ
moves.en: For 3 turns the target can only use damaging moves (cannot use status moves).

moves.name: てだすけ
moves.en: Priority +5. This turn, raises the power of the ally's move by 1.5x.

moves.name: リサイクル
moves.en: The user regains the last item it consumed this battle. Fails if the user is already holding an item.

moves.name: ふういん
moves.en: User enters Imprison: until it leaves the field, opponents cannot use any move that the user also knows.

effects.effect: opponents cannot use moves the user also knows

moves.name: じゅうりょく
moves.en: For 5 turns, all Pokemon's accuracy is x5/3; Flying-types and Levitate Pokemon become grounded; airborne moves are disabled and ongoing ones cancelled; Telekinesis is removed; Grav Apple/G-Force power is x1.5.

sub_effects: ground Flying-types and Levitate (Ground moves now hit them)
disable airborne moves (そらをとぶ/はねる/とびげり/とびひざげり/とびはねる/でんじふゆう/フライングプレス/フリーフォール) and cancel if in use
Grav Apple (Gのちから) power x1.5

moves.name: パワートリック
moves.en: Swaps the user's Attack and Defense actual stats. Stat ranks are unchanged.

effects.note: swaps actual stat values; ranks unchanged

moves.name: いえき
moves.en: Suppresses (nullifies) the target's ability for as long as it stays in. Does not affect form-related abilities or certain unique abilities.

moves.name: なやみのタネ
moves.en: Changes the target's ability to Insomnia. Fails against certain unique abilities.

moves.name: トリックルーム
moves.en: Priority -7. For 5 turns, slower Pokemon move first. Using it again while active cancels it.

effects.effect: Pokemon with lower Speed act first

moves.name: マジックルーム
moves.en: For 5 turns, the effects of all Pokemon's held items are nullified. Using it again while active cancels it.

effects.effect: all held item effects are nullified

moves.name: シンプルビーム
moves.en: Changes the target's ability to Simple.

moves.name: そうでん
moves.en: If used before the target acts, the target's attack becomes Electric-type for that turn.

moves.name: じばそうさ
moves.en: Raises Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage for the user's team members that have the Plus or Minus ability. Blocked by Max Guard.

moves.name: スピードスワップ
moves.en: Swaps the user's and the target's Speed actual stats.

moves.name: おちゃかい
moves.en: Every Pokemon on the field immediately consumes its held Berry and triggers its effect.

moves.name: ソウルビート
moves.en: User loses 1/3 of its max HP and raises all of its own stats by 1 stage. A sound-based move.

moves.name: いのちのしずく
moves.en: Heals the user and all team members by 1/4 of their max HP each. Not blocked by Max Guard. Nullified for allies with Water Absorb / Storm Drain (their ability triggers instead).

immune.effect: ability triggers instead; heal nullified for that ally
